quotes: Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

asset_groups.name: Campaign Headline Colorways
asset_groups.semantics: Choose one of the two approved YOU DESERVE MORE headline colorways: Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.

asset_groups.name: Wave Variants
asset_groups.semantics: Approved wave family comprising Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorways, each available in long and short variants.

assets.description: Branded orange/yellow gradient PNG used as the full-width Gradient Callout CTA section background.

quotes: Background → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px).

Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.

assets.description: LISRAYA logo icon or mark with the required 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / Gold.

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.

assets.description: Priovant logo assigned to the locked header or footer components.

quotes: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

assets.description: Warm Gold/Sunshine colorway of the three-line, left-aligned YOU DESERVE MORE campaign headline lockup, with the D and M at approximately 40% tint.

quotes: **ALL CAPS, always.**
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

assets.description: Brand Blue colorway of the three-line, left-aligned YOU DESERVE MORE campaign headline lockup, with the D and M at approximately 40% tint.

The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.

Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

assets.description: Long Sunshine/Gold layered wave with a 70% transparent Gold top layer over a Sunshine base wave.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth.

assets.description: Approved masthead device combining a horizontal Sunshine-to-light-gold gradient with the LISRAYA logo mark at the lightest end.

quotes: | Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

assets.description: Warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery showing simple everyday activities such as walking the dog, going to the beach, or attending a BBQ.

quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.
Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

assets.description: Minimal line-illustration icon family with consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
[GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

assets.description: Single-line pill icon referenced for use in a secondary or data callout.

quotes: may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon).

assets.description: White asymmetric rounded-square icon badge with a Brand Blue line icon, required subtle shadow, and 50/50 overhang across the left edge of the Light Blue callout box.

quotes: **Icon badge** ? a **White `#ffffff` rounded square** holding the line icon (Brand Blue stroke), **vertically centered** on the box and **horizontally centered on the box's left edge** (the edge is the badge's perpendicular bisector ? 50% over the blue, 50% over the page background).
Let `W` = badge width (use **80px**, icon ?48px inside).
The white badge **mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale**, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;` (also 5:1, large TL+BR).
**Drop shadow (mandatory):** the white icon badge **must carry a subtle drop shadow** so it lifts off the blue box � e.g. `box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18);` (Dark Navy at low opacity).

assets.description: Approved asymmetric internal CTA SVG shape with a horizontal light-yellow-to-orange gradient.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0 25C0 11.1929 11.1929 0 25 0H177.5C178.605 0 179.5 0.895431 179.5 2V33.5C179.5 47.3071 168.307 58.5 154.5 58.5H2C0.895433 58.5 0 57.6046 0 56.5V25Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_75_5202)"/> <defs> <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_75_5202" x1="0" y1="29.25" x2="179.5" y2="29.25" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"> <stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/> </linearGradient> </defs> </svg>

subtypes.best_for: Directly stacked, self-contained email sections that render edge-to-edge at the fixed email body width.

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.

subtypes.name: 600px Modular Email Section
subtypes.notes: Sections are self-contained table-based blocks with no external margins.

templates.body: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

quotes: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

templates.description: Approved full-width gradient CTA banner with a centered headline and one centered button.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget).
**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;`
## MJML

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

templates.name: Gradient Callout CTA Section
templates.notes: The background image may be omitted only for the stated fallback cases; the solid Sunshine fill and all other rules remain unchanged.

templates.body: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

templates.description: Approved Light Blue proof-point callout with live text and a white icon badge positioned half-on and half-off the box's left edge.

quotes: A **light-blue accent-shape box** containing a short blue headline, with a **white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge** � the edge runs through the badge's center so it reads as half-on / half-off the box.
Used for supporting "proof point" statements (dosing convenience, time-to-effect, etc.).
## MJML
The 50/50 overhang relies on `position:absolute`, which Apple Mail / iOS / most web clients honor but **Outlook (desktop, Word engine) ignores**
For pixel-perfect fidelity across **all** clients, the brand-safe option is to **pre-composite the white badge (with its shadow, accent radii, and icon) as a transparent PNG**

templates.name: Icon Callout Box
templates.notes: The live 50/50 overhang degrades in Outlook desktop; the source permits a pre-composited transparent PNG or a baked background treatment for pixel-perfect fidelity.
